profile.profession: Medical student preparing for NEET PG
profile.personality: earnest, slightly anxious about exams, opens up about study stress

transcript.content: Hi Aarti, I'm Miss Maya. I love how exciting it feels to try something new, like baking a chocolate cake. What's making you want to try it now?
Hi Maya, nice to meet you. I’ve been trying to learn new things to take my mind off studies. My friend baked a cake yesterday, it smelled so good. I want to try, but I’m a bit scared I’ll mess up.
"Nice to meet you too. Learning new things is a great way to relax, baking can be fun even if it’s not perfect. What part feels most tricky for you?"
The measurements, maybe? Like, if I add too much flour or sugar, it’ll be bad. Also, I don’t have much time because I have to study. But I really want to try.
"Got it. Measurements can be tricky, but practice helps. What kind of cake recipe are you thinking of trying?"

A simple chocolate cake, maybe. I saw a video on YouTube, but I’m not sure if I can follow it. The ingredients looked easy, but I’m worried about the steps. I’ll try, I think. It’s worth it, even if it’s not perfect.
"Good to hear you're giving it a try! A simple chocolate cake is a great start. What’s the first step you’ll try?"

Maybe buy the ingredients first. I need cocoa powder, flour, sugar, eggs… I don’t have them at home. Also, check the video again to remember the steps. But I’m worried it’ll take too much time. Aaj mere paas sirf ek ghanta h.
"Buying the ingredients is a good first step. Time can feel tight, but one hour is enough to start. What part worries you most, the time, the steps, or the result?"
The steps and time, maybe. I don’t want to waste time if I’m confused. Also, I don’t want to make a mess in the kitchen. My parents will be home soon, so I have to be quick. But I’ll try, okay?
"Got it. Quick and careful steps are the way to go. What’s the first step you’ll try to keep things simple?"
Maybe I’ll start by watching the video again, just for 10-15 minutes. Then I’ll write down the steps and ingredients so I don’t forget. I’ll do it quickly, okay? Baki time study karu lagto.
"Nice plan, short steps work best. What’s the first thing you’ll write down?"

The first thing I’ll write down is the list of ingredients. I’ll note the measurements too, like how much flour or sugar I need. Maybe I’ll highlight the cocoa powder because that’s what makes it chocolatey. Then I’ll check the time and start preparing. Okay, I should go now, I have to study. Thank you, Maya!
"Great start, writing the list makes it easier. Will you try the cocoa powder first or save it for later?"
